reportedRuntimeFailure.rootCause: Raw JavaScript client fragments containing HTML template literals were read with HtmlService.createHtmlOutputFromFile(), which parsed each fragment as standalone HTML before Portal_Index rendered.
reportedRuntimeFailure.correction: Allowlisted client and style fragments now use HtmlService.createTemplateFromFile(fileName).getRawContent().

productionTarget.deploymentDescription: Highway 38 Owner Portal HTML hotfix f72463f3554377c02250d13696bc8949d76d634c

githubActionsEvidence.workflow: Deploy Owner Portal HTML Include Hotfix

postDeploymentAcceptance: Reload the existing private Owner Portal and confirm the malformed HTML exception is gone
Run the non-destructive Owner Portal self-test
Verify Today, Needs Rick's Decision, Active Work, Money, Growth, Website, and System Health
Verify Unified Tasks list, board, and calendar modes
Verify selected-task actions remain single-record and approval controlled
Verify Proof Log and Error Log behavior
Retain screenshots and final acceptance evidence
prohibitedClaims: Do not claim final runtime acceptance until the owner reload, self-test, and desktop/mobile checks are recorded
Do not claim customer portal activation
Do not claim any external provider action is enabled
nextExecutableStep: Reload the existing private Owner Portal version 12. If it renders, run the non-destructive self-test and complete desktop/mobile acceptance, then record final acceptance on Issues #33 and #31.
